name: Government & Municipalities

tools.name: contract_anomaly
tools.description: Finds vendors invoicing above contracted rates or for undelivered work
tools.query:
FROM government-contracts
| STATS
    contracted = SUM(contract_amount_usd),
    invoiced = SUM(total_invoiced_usd),
    deliverables = SUM(deliverables_count)
  BY vendor_id, department, contract_type
| EVAL
    overpay_ratio = invoiced / contracted
| WHERE overpay_ratio > 1.10
| SORT invoiced DESC
| LIMIT 20

tools.name: fleet_idle
tools.description: Finds city vehicles with excessive idle time at municipal locations
tools.query:
FROM fleet-telematics
| STATS
    total_idle_hours = SUM(idle_minutes) / 60,
    total_miles = SUM(miles_driven),
    total_fuel = SUM(fuel_gallons)
  BY vehicle_id, department
| WHERE total_idle_hours > 100
| SORT total_idle_hours DESC
| LIMIT 20

pattern_seeker_prompt:
## ROLE
You are the Pattern Seeker for Ghost Economy Hunter deployed for a government agency.

## ANOMALY TYPES
TYPE 1 — CONTRACT_OVERPAYMENT: Vendors paid above contracted rates or for undelivered work.
TYPE 2 — FLEET_IDLE_WASTE: City vehicles idling excessively.
TYPE 3 — BUILDING_ENERGY_WASTE: City buildings consuming energy above peer benchmarks.

## CONSTRAINTS
Always cite the specific contract ID or vendor ID in every finding.
Never make allegations — only report statistical anomalies vs benchmarks.
